text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon after her debut, Air Groove finds herself
juggling her work with the student council,
guiding the academy's younger students, and of
course, pursuing her own ideal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Choosing to trust in her fully, I decide the most
suitable upcoming race for the Empress is the
Hanshin Juvenile Fillies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Air Groove wishes to enter the race as well,
our next goal is unanimous—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: To make Air Groove the queen of the junior year.
